title: Teamsterz Mean Machine Garbage Truck Toy | Light & Sound Garbage Truck Vehicle | Construction and Waste Collection Toy For Kids | Kids' Play Figures & Vehicles Toy Car Set | Ages 3+
description: Product Description Teamsterz - Mean Machines Recycling Truck Introducing the ultimate clean-up adventure for your little one. his thrilling and interactive toy is designed to spark your child's imagination and turn everyday chores into exciting missions. Does your little one love watching the bins being put into the big truck, well now they can have a go themselves. This is perfect for anyone who loves large trucks and promotes learning through play by allowing them to use their wildest imagination. Help keep the streets clean with the Teamsterz Mean Machines Lights & Sound Garbage Truck. Press the button to activate blue flashing lights, music, realistic engine noises and garbage truck sounds. The sleek futuristic design features independent free-moving wheels, manual road sweeping blades as well as a manually operated rear rubbish hatch for all your recycling. Aiding the development of your little one’s cognitive and motor skills this is the perfect size for push along play. SUITABLE FOR AGES 3+ LIGHTS & SOUNDS The Light and Sounds range from Teamsterz is perfect for some sensory play with any child. Our Mean Machines range offers realistic flashing lights and siren noises your little one can learn everything they need to know about our emergency services. Early learning is not complete without pretend play and the more imaginative play your child has, the more their creativity and imagination will grow. The ideal gift for any child interested in construction. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Includes 1x Mean Machines Garbage Truck Toy. Requires 3x AAA Batteries. (Please note these are included). Product Dimensions - H16cm x W11cm x D35cm. Suitable for all children aged 3+. TEAMSTERZ RANGE The Teamsterz Range offers an extensive range of collectable die-cast vehicles from their Monster Moverz Transporters, Emergency City and their Metro City range. Learning is made possible by the Teamsterz Range by interacting with their realistic light and sound vehicles. . We also want children to explore the world around them and find adventure in their own home and garden, so Teamsterz also offers a wide range of playsets, garages and track sets.
